meaning: n.亚拿尼亚(圣经中人物,因欺骗圣灵而死),撒谎者
examples: There were among them of the children of Juda, Daniel, Ananias, Misael, and Azarias.
But the Lord said to Ananias, 'Go!
Patrus Ananias, who is close to activists in the Catholic church, takes over a new Ministry of Social Development and Hunger Alleviation.
